title: The Promise That Started It All
overview: A young escapee and a listless hunter meet by chance, unaware of the covenant that will soon bind them.

title: The Covenant Ritual
overview: Their pact grants Jiro and Kumi the power to defend the town from the giant beast. It also exposes their location to Imperial forces.

title: Long Rain Village
overview: Low on supplies and with their escape route cut off, the three companions seek shelter in a nearby village. There, they meet a youth who dreams of becoming a Paladin.

title: The Drifting Spear
overview: Jiro underestimates a mysterious traveler and loses his spear in a game of chance. She has an agenda, but what interest could she have with a Cleric and a Paladin?

title: Test of Strength
overview: Jiro has a violent history with the people of the mountains. When the group finds themselves in their village, the inhabitants challenge the Paladin to a test of strength.

title: An Inescapable Shadow
overview: Kumi dreads there’s a connection between her and the red-eyed beasts. And when her friends try to help her, they may all end up with more questions than answers.

title: Violet Evokes the Memory of Horns
overview: Jiro was married once. Her name was Toka, and this is how their story began — and ended.

title: Proof of Identity
overview: Kumi used to be an empty shell of a person until a fateful encounter changed her life. Now, she seeks to save a counterpart from her cruel fate.

title: The Warrior and the Healer
overview: Jiro and his friends WILL put an end to the Imperial experiments. However, they are not the only ones with the conviction to do what must be done. Conflict is inevitable.

title: The Emissary of the Securians
overview: Kumi and the others launch an assault on the laboratory to save the prototypes. However, Mezami hasn’t come this far just to see his ambitions go down in flames.

title: The Fleeting Flower
overview: Kumi can either live the little time she may have left as a normal girl or continue fighting. Jiro and the others have their opinions, but what does Kumi want?

title: The Ring's Judgement
overview: Giant beasts attack the people of Ars en masse, forcing everyone to fight for their very lives. As chaos reigns, Myaa prepares to unleash her trump card.
